channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gore Verbinski’s sci-fi comedy explores AI fears through humour, time loops and human resilience
item.description: Scroll.in’s film recommendation column highlights Gore Verbinski’s science-fiction comedy ‘Good Luck, Have Fun, Don’t Die’, describing it as an imaginative and energetic film about the dangers of arti...

item.title: Winter skincare reset: how to protect and adjust your routine for colder months
item.description: This lifestyle beauty feature focuses on how to adapt skincare routines as the seasons shift from summer into winter, when colder temperatures often lead to dryness, sensitivity, breakouts, and dull s...

item.title: Toshifumi Suzuki, founder of Seven-Eleven Japan and retail innovator, passes away at 93
item.description: Toshifumi Suzuki, widely recognised as the founder of Seven-Eleven Japan and a key figure in shaping Japan’s modern convenience store industry, has died of heart failure at the age of 93. His death oc...

item.title: Analysis of shifting geopolitical balance following US–Iran tensions and China’s diplomatic role
item.description: In this opinion column, Mark Almond argues that recent geopolitical developments following a 12-week conflict in the Middle East have significantly reshaped regional and global power dynamics. Althoug...

item.title: Theatergoers praise musical ‘Makara’ for its unexpected plot twists
item.description: The musical ‘Makara’ has recently gained positive attention from theatergoers, particularly for its engaging storytelling and unexpected plot twists. According to a report by ABS-CBN News, the product...

item.title: CJ Group Executive Miky Lee Reflects on Building Korea’s Global Entertainment Industry
item.description: The CNN segment highlights the career and influence of Miky Lee, vice chairwoman of CJ Group, and her role in helping expand South Korea’s entertainment industry onto the global stage. Featured as par...

item.title: Asparagus with saffron vinaigrette and sunchoke goat cheese flan recipe by Mission Hill Estate chef
item.description: This recipe, created by Executive Chef Patrick Gayler of The Terrace Restaurant at Mission Hill Family Estate, presents a refined seasonal dish built around fresh asparagus, saffron vinaigrette, and a...

item.title: Megyn Kelly Criticizes Donald Trump’s Marital History and References Past Allegations In Podcast Appearance
item.description: In a recent appearance on the “Hodgetwins Podcast,” former Fox News host Megyn Kelly made a series of critical remarks about President Donald Trump’s personal life and past relationships. During the d...

item.title: Political confrontation between TMC and BJP escalates after Falta re-poll results amid allegations over counting process
item.description: A political confrontation has intensified between the Trinamool Congress (TMC) and the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) following the re-poll results in West Bengal’s Falta constituency. BJP candidate Deb...

item.title: Cory Booker Criticizes Trump’s Iran Negotiations, Claims Policy Is Worse Than Obama-Era Deal

item.title: India and US Push for Early Interim Trade Agreement as American Team Plans Delhi Visit
item.description: India and the United States are working towards the early conclusion of an interim trade agreement, with an American delegation expected to visit New Delhi soon to continue negotiations. External Affa...

item.title: Trump criticises Republican critics as Cruz and Graham warn over proposed Iran nuclear deal
item.description: President Donald Trump has publicly clashed with senior figures within his own Republican Party over a developing framework for a potential agreement with Iran. According to reports, the emerging deal...

item.title: Pep Guardiola Ends Manchester City Era With Emotional Goodbye After Aston Villa Defeat
item.description: Pep Guardiola bid farewell to Manchester City fans in an emotional atmosphere after the club lost 2-1 to Aston Villa in his final match at the Etihad Stadium. The defeat came just days after City’s Pr...

item.title: Lehohla calls for data-driven reparations and African statistical sovereignty in response to Macron’s slavery remarks
item.description: In this opinion piece, Pali Lehohla reflects on French President Emmanuel Macron’s remarks during a ceremony marking 25 years since France recognised slavery as a crime against humanity. Macron’s ques...

item.title: Piyush Goyal to hold talks with Canadian PM Mark Carney in Ottawa to advance India-Canada trade agreement
item.description: India’s Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal is on an official visit to Canada from Monday to Wednesday, during which he will meet Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney in Ottawa on the first day...

item.title: DNA research identifies additional sailors from the 1845 Franklin expedition
item.description: Researchers studying the disastrous 1845 Franklin Northwest Passage expedition have identified more crew members through advanced DNA analysis, shedding fresh light on one of Britain’s most infamous p...

item.title: NDLEA Arrests 63-Year-Old Chinese Woman at Lagos Airport Over 31kg Synthetic Cannabis
item.description: Operatives of the National Drug Law Enforcement Agency (NDLEA) don arrest a 63-year-old Chinese woman, Ting Hung Kiong, for allegedly attempting to smuggle synthetic cannabis known as Canadian Loud in...

item.title: Rare Behind-the-Scenes Publicity Photos Highlight Tom Hanks and Daryl Hannah During the Making of “Splash”

item.title: Iran and US Near Agreement but Key Clauses and Nuclear Issues Still Unresolved
